0.text: Subpleural linear density in the lateral lingular segment of the left lung upper lobe

1.text: Localized ground-glass opacity in the upper lobe anterior segment of the left lung

2.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the anterior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Pleuroparenchymal bands in the anterior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

4.text: Traction bronchiectasis in the anterior segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

5.text: Subpleural ground-glass opacity in the anterior segment of the left lung upper lobe

6.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in both lungs
